summary: Live-edit your GitHub components directly in the browser Discussion | Link
content: Hi Product Hunt! 👋 ArachStudio helps designers & developers live-edit codebases & components online. How it works: Connect GitHub via access token. Scan & load your project path. Make real-time style edits in the visual preview (desktop/mobile). Export the final product! Help us decide: We are testing two different demo versions. Try both links and tell us which experience you prefer in the comments!
chineseSummary: 直接在浏览器中实时编辑 GitHub 组件关联
chineseContent: 嗨，产品搜寻！ 👋 ArachStudio 帮助设计师和开发人员在线实时编辑代码库和组件。工作原理：通过访问令牌连接 GitHub。扫描并加载您的项目路径。在视觉预览（桌面/移动设备）中进行实时样式编辑。最终产品出口！帮助我们做出决定：我们正在测试两个不同的演示版本。尝试这两个链接并在评论中告诉我们您更喜欢哪种体验！
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
